title: Erik, the Viking
writer: Mario Caiano, Arpad DeRiso, Mariano Ozores
actors: Gordon Mitchell, Giuliano Gemma, Eleonora Bianchi
plot: Viking chief Thorvald dies from a mortal combat wound. He realizes his son Erloff is not a worthy successor, but his will divides his property equally between him and Erik, the valiant son of his sister, who also gets his weapons ...
